case_title: IRMA MARTINEZ VS. KAREN J EASON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT EASON, KAREN J AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
